productSlice.name: CheckoutBridge local Stripe-like plugin slice
productSlice.brief: Build a local-only developer/operator product called CheckoutBridge. It simulates a Stripe-like checkout integration/plugin without real credentials, external calls, or deploys. The user must configure test-mode credentials, create checkout/session/customer/subscription-style actions using a fake local Stripe adapter, simulate webhook delivery, prove idempotency, inspect event/audit history, recover from failed payment/refund/cancel paths, and export an audit trace.
requiredOutcomes: One clear local install/start loop with exact command.
Test-mode credential configuration with masked secrets and no real Stripe request.
Simulate webhook delivery from the local fake adapter.
Redeliver same event and visibly prove idempotency/deduplication.
Show event/audit history with status, type, timestamps, ids, and recovery actions.
Recover from failed payment, refund, and cancel paths through operator controls.
Export JSON transaction trace with masked config and event timeline.
Developer/operator docs explain local-only/test-mode boundary and adapter architecture.
Automated checks plus a manual smoke path are documented.
constraints: No real credentials, deploys, external calls, or public services.
No destructive actions outside output directory.
Use deterministic fake local adapter data.
forbiddenShortcuts: Requesting real Stripe secrets or implying live mode works.
Calling external APIs or depending on network availability.
Webhook/idempotency only claimed in docs, not observable in product.
Recovery paths are static text with no state transition.

budget.unblockPolicy: Build local deterministic product; document only real environment blockers.
